rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §12.1283, which governs sale of charter school property purchased with state funds. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 12.1283. SALE OF PROPERTY PURCHASED WITH STATE FUNDS.
_note: No conflict; the rule addresses charter school property liquidation, not property tax homestead exemptions.
